title: arenaria groenlandica var. glabra
intro: Arenaria groenlandica var. glabra, also known as Glabrous Arctic Sandwort, is a plant species that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Arenaria groenlandica var. glabra include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
